name: Gemini CLI ACP Runtime
description: ACP runtime backend powered by Gemini CLI over stdio JSON-RPC.

command.label: Gemini CLI Command
command.help: Command or path used to launch Gemini CLI ACP.

cwd.label: Default Working Directory
cwd.help: Default working directory for Gemini ACP sessions.

model.label: Default Model
model.help: Model configured after Gemini ACP session creation.

env.label: Environment Overrides
env.help: Optional environment variables passed to the Gemini ACP subprocess.
